query:
CREATE TABLE `timeLogs` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`employeeId` int NOT NULL,
	`clockIn` bigint NOT NULL,
	`clockOut` bigint,
	`hoursWorked` float,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `timeLogs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
)
